text: 651 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أَوَّلُ اَلْوَقْتِ رِضْوَانُ اَللَّهِ وَ آخِرُهُ عَفْوُ اَللَّهِ وَ اَلْعَفْوُ لاَ يَكُونُ إِلاَّ مِنْ ذَنْبٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.651 - Imam (as) said:
"The beginning of the time (for prayer) brings the pleasure of Allah (swt), while the end of it brings the forgiveness of Allah (swt), and forgiveness is only for a sin."
